name: Apple iPhone 15
shortDescription: 6.1-inch iPhone with A16 Bionic, USB-C, and 48MP main camera.
description: iPhone 15 features a bright Super Retina XDR display, Dynamic Island, powerful A16 Bionic chip, and strong all-round camera performance.

comments.name: Igor
comments.text: Great camera and excellent everyday performance.

comments.name: Sara
comments.text: Battery and screen quality are very good.
